prompt: A cinematic anime-style movie poster of a girl with light blue hair, animal ears, and a fluffy tail, wearing an oversized white t-shirt. She stands on a wet, reflective rural Japanese train station platform at twilight, looking back over her shoulder. The sky is a dramatic gradient of deep blue to pink. The platform has a glowing vending machine, train tracks, and signs reading "終点 TERMINAL" and "まもなく 終点 ご乗車ありがとうございました". Elegant typography includes top text "終点のひとつ手前で、ソーダさんはいつも笑う。", a large bottom title "終点からソーダさん" with English subtitle "FROM THE TERMINAL, SODA-SAN", and bottom text "たぶん恋ではなく、もう少し炭酸だった。".
